stories.headline: Bitcoin Anchors Near $70K as Hormuz Blockade Keeps Crypto on Edge
stories.tldr: BTC is hovering near $70,000 and ether is down 4% after U.S.-Iran peace talks collapsed and Trump ordered a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Crypto is now trading as a geopolitical risk asset, not a hedge — CME bitcoin futures activity just hit a 14-month low and the Fear & Greed Index is at 12, signaling extreme fear heading into a U.S. Senate week packed with policy catalysts.
the_details: BTC ~3.2% below Sunday's open; ETH ~4.1% lower as oil spiked back over $100
Crypto Fear & Greed Index at 12 — 'Extreme Fear' territory not seen since late 2024
CME bitcoin futures open interest has dropped to a 14-month low as macro funds de-risk

stories.headline: White House Crypto Adviser Says CLARITY Act Hurdles Are Clearing
stories.tldr: Top White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt says talks are resolving the remaining sticking points on the CLARITY Act ahead of a late-April Senate Banking markup.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: If the compromise holds, the U.S. gets its first comprehensive crypto market structure law before the November midterms — miss the window and the bill slips into 2027 political uncertainty.
the_details: Stablecoin yield language remains the biggest unresolved fight; Coinbase and Stripe have objected to the current bank-friendly text
Senate Banking Committee markup targeted for late April; bill must clear committee before May to stay on track
White House Council of Economic Advisers says banning crypto stablecoin rewards would lift bank lending only 0.02%

stories.headline: Bitmine Now Holds 4% of All Ether Ever Issued
stories.tldr: BitMine Immersion bought another 71,524 ETH last week, pushing its treasury to 4.87 million ether — roughly 4.04% of circulating supply — in its biggest weekly haul since December.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A single Nasdaq-listed treasury now controls enough ETH to move the market, and its management says they view ether as nearing the end of a 'mini-crypto winter' — a concentration story with real float implications.
the_details: BMNR disclosed 4,874,858 ETH holdings worth ~$10.75B at $2,206 per ETH as of April 12
Total crypto and cash position now $11.8B; company uplisted from NYSE American to NYSE on April 9
Last week's 71,524 ETH buy is the largest single-week accumulation since Dec. 22, 2025

stories.headline: RAVE's 6,000% Rally Draws Manipulation Scrutiny
stories.tldr: RaveDAO's RAVE token has exploded from about $0.25 to over $14 in a week, vaulting into the top 50 by market cap — but on-chain data shows the supply is extremely concentrated.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The move looks less like Web3 music adoption and more like a short squeeze on paper-thin float, and it's the kind of speculative blowoff that historically marks late-cycle behavior.
the_details: Market cap jumped ~33x in 7 days, from ~$60M to ~$2B
Roughly 90% of supply sits in 3 wallets and 98%+ in the top 10, per chain analysts
Project markets itself as on-chain ticketing and artist payments for EDM events, claims exchange partnerships

stories.headline: Securitize Expands to TRON for Real-World Asset Tokenization
stories.tldr: Securitize is bringing tokenized funds and securities to TRON, plugging into a network with over 373M accounts, $26B TVL, and $7.9T in annual transfer volume.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: TRON is the largest dollar-settlement rail outside the U.S. banking system; putting Securitize-grade tokenized treasuries and funds on it is a serious step in the RWA race, and a signal that the U.S.-led RWA stack now needs global distribution to scale.
the_details: Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo and TRON founder Justin Sun jointly announced the integration
A new RWA product is slated to debut on TRON with details to follow
Securitize's SPAC combination with Cantor Equity Partners II is expected to close in H1 2026

stories.headline: Binance Turns On Price Range Execution Rule to Curb Bad Fills
stories.tldr: Binance's new Spot Price Range Execution Rule (PRER) goes live April 14, blocking user orders from executing at abnormal prices during extreme volatility.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The guardrail is a direct response to flash-dislocation losses retail traders took during recent macro-driven selloffs, and it moves Binance's spot venue closer to the protections derivatives venues have offered for years.
the_details: Rule activates April 14 across Binance spot pairs
Orders that would fill significantly outside recent price ranges will be blocked rather than partially executed
Comes as retail flow has stayed thin through the Iran/Hormuz-driven drawdown
